review_notes: Walters documents public and regional investment across transit, health care, broadband, and infrastructure, plus explicit environmental protection, supporting modest positive spending and climate scores. Her current county and regional-board record supports a proven-record lean without requiring maximal tenure. Tisdel's outcome discipline and affordability support modest restraint, while his utility and business management record without elected county service supports a modest renewal score. Other stated topics lack enough policy mechanism to place them confidently on housing, safety, or taxes.
